purpose: Document and extend debug-only diagnostics for feat selection and choice handling. These logs are gated behind the existing SWSE debug mode and must not change rules execution.

diagnosticHooks.answers: How many feats were legal, and why were unavailable feats blocked? Buckets include prerequisites, slot mismatch, already owned, already granted, evaluation error, and other unavailable.
When a selected feat requires an immediate choice, what choice kind/source/resolution is expected and what value was selected?
When the resolver builds a choice list, how many options were found, what are examples, and did the choice derive from fixed options, prerequisites, or a grant pool?
Which owned feats have missing required choices or invalid stored choices?
Which feat selections created, retained, or removed pending entitlements such as Force Power picks, language picks, skill-training slots, or starship maneuver picks?
Why a passive/conditional modifier was excluded from a static sheet or roll context.

debugGate: All diagnostics use swseLogger.isDev(), which depends on existing SWSE debug mode/HouseRuleService debugMode behavior.
validation: python JSON parse check for docs/feat-choice-required-audit-phase5.json and docs/feat-diagnostics-phase5.json
